column6: A.4. Excessive worrying about everyday matters
column7: A.5. Fear of something bad, or even the worst, happening
column10: B.3. Heart palpitations or heart beating fast (not related to physical effort or activity)
column12: C.1. Social situations (where one may be observed, or evaluated by others, such as speaking in public, or talking to unknown people)
column13: C.2. Public Setting (situations from which it may be difficult or embarrassing to escape, such as queues or lines, crowds, bridges, or public transportation)
column14: C.3. Specific objects or situations (such as flying, heights, spiders or other animals, needles, or blood)
